creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
Created attachment 209786
svn diff net-mgmt/netdisco

Just reformat patch to facilitate commiter's work (/usr/ports relative)

Changes:
* #646 Add DOCSIS (Cable Modem) peers discovery as neighbors
* #621 RADIUS authentication support for users
* #630 display full OUI vendor name in web view
* add PoE on-off icons to legend in Device Ports view
* many bugfixes and enhancements

https://github.com/netdisco/netdisco/blob/master/Changes
